name: biopython
tagline: Reference skill for Biopython: sequence I/O, alignments, NCBI/Entrez/BLAST access, PDB structures, phylogenetics.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped reference skill. All example code is plain, unobfuscated Python; network calls (Entrez/BLAST) are the stated purpose, clearly declared in the compatibility field, and only read NCBI_EMAIL/NCBI_API_KEY via structured metadata fields rather than prompting for secrets in chat. Version is pinned on install. No destructive ops, no hidden instru

highlights.summary: `allowed-tools: Read Write Edit Bash` (line 4) is a space-delimited plain scalar rather than the more common comma-separated or YAML-list form; likely parses fine as a single string but is a nonstanda
